basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal – Research Associate and Project Assistants – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Research Associate and Project Assistants. Candidates with PHD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Warangal official website.

qualification.education_qualification: PHD in Computer Science (Thesis submitted also considered), First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in B. Tech./B.E in CSE/ECE, First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in Bachelor degree

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Project Assistants Posts
